results.title: Breaking away: 2026 All-County girls soccer team spotlights area’s best
results.description: The 2026 All-County Team for girls soccer honors the best of the best from another standout year of girls soccer in Shelby County, where teams and players ranked among the state’s elite.

results.title: Bow Echo unable to turn tide in favour of the backers on day one at Ascot
results.description: Ed Walker’s 50-1 Queen Anne winner Ten Bob Tony set the tone.

results.title: Alex Pereira Calls Out Ref in Video, Shows Photos After Ciryl Gane KO Loss at UFC White House Event
results.description: UFC star Alex Pereira isn't happy with how his loss to Ciryl Gane played out at Sunday's Freedom 250 event at the White House.
